name: Mixed Grain Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the grains in a mixing bowl and set aside.
2. Pour the oil into a 2-3 quart casserole that is safe for both stovetop and oven cooking, and place on medium heat.
3. When hot, sauté onion and garlic until tender and translucent, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add the mixed grains and sauté for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Meanwhile, melt butter or margarine (if using) in a separate pan on medium-high heat. When hot, add mushrooms and sauté quickly, stirring frequently until the shrooms are hot and have just absorbed the "butter" (about 1 minute). Remove from heat.
6. Add the broth, herbs, and mushrooms to the casserole with the onions and grains, and bring to a boil.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cover tightly (use aluminum foil between pot and cover if necessary for a good seal), and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
(8 servings as a side dish, less as an entree)
